pr.title: Clean up pragmas in `aobj` and reformat
pr.author: ribbanya

summary: Small cleanup-only PR for `src/sysdolphin/baselib/aobj.c`. It reformatted C code and inline assembly boundaries, standardized float literal suffixes and cast spacing, and replaced a broad peephole-optimization workaround after asm blocks with localized `#pragma push`/`#pragma pop` wrappers around each asm function. No review discussion or PR body text was present in the slice.
what_changed: Changed lowercase float literal suffixes such as `0.0f` and `1.0f` to uppercase `0.0F` and `1.0F` in `HSD_AObjInterpretAnim`, `HSD_AObjLoadDesc`, and `HSD_AObjAlloc`.
Reformatted function declarations and braces, including `float fmod(float a, float b)` and `HSD_AObjAlloc(void)`.
Standardized pointer and cast spacing in declarations and calls, for example `struct _HSD_AObj*`, `void*`, `(HSD_JObj*) aobj->hsd_obj`, `(HSD_ObjAllocLink*) aobj`, and `(u32) arg->d`.
Reformatted `callbackForeachFunc` switch cases to the project style: `switch (arg_type)` with cases aligned one indentation level inside the switch instead of deeply indented.
Added `#pragma push`/`#pragma pop` around individual inline asm functions `func_803647DC`, `func_80364924`, and `HSD_ForeachAnim`.
Added `// clang-format off` and `// clang-format on` comments at the braces of the asm functions to protect raw assembly formatting.
Removed the previous comment and trailing `#pragma push`/`#pragma peephole on` workaround after `HSD_ForeachAnim`, along with the matching `#pragma pop` after `HSD_AObjSetCurrentFrame`.
Whitespace-only cleanup removed stray trailing spaces and normalized blank lines.
smart_moves: Localized compiler pragma scope to each asm block instead of leaving a peephole pragma workaround active across following C functions.
Protected large inline assembly bodies from automatic formatting with explicit `clang-format off/on` markers rather than relying on broad file-level formatting avoidance.
Kept the PR narrowly scoped to one file and mostly mechanical formatting, reducing risk of accidental behavioral changes.
Removed an explanatory peephole comment once the pragma layout made the workaround unnecessary, avoiding stale documentation around asm side effects.
decomp_lessons: Inline `asm` in this codebase can affect optimization behavior of following functions; prefer containing asm with `#pragma push`/`#pragma pop` around the asm function itself.
When reformatting files with raw inline PowerPC assembly, guard asm blocks with `clang-format off/on` so instruction comments, labels, and spacing remain stable.
For cleanup PRs in matched or partially matched files, keep semantic code untouched and make style normalization easy to review.
Use project-consistent cast spacing and pointer style when touching baselib C code, especially near object allocation/freeing helpers.
Float literal suffix style in this touched file was normalized to uppercase `F`; future edits in nearby code should avoid reintroducing mixed `f`/`F` suffixes.
naming_conventions: Public baselib AObj APIs use `HSD_AObj...` names, such as `HSD_AObjInterpretAnim`, `HSD_AObjLoadDesc`, `HSD_AObjAlloc`, `HSD_AObjFree`, `HSD_AObjSetRate`, and `HSD_AObjSetCurrentFrame`.
Internal or still-unidentified functions in this file include address-derived names such as `func_803647DC` and `func_80364924`.
AObj argument enum values use the `AOBJ_ARG_...` prefix, for example `AOBJ_ARG_A`, `AOBJ_ARG_AF`, `AOBJ_ARG_AOTF`, and `AOBJ_ARG_AOTU`.
AObj flags use the `AOBJ_...` prefix, such as `AOBJ_FIRST_PLAY`, `AOBJ_LOOP`, `AOBJ_REWINDED`, and `AOBJ_NO_ANIM`.
The helper `callbackForeachFunc` remained camelCase in this PR; the slice does not show a rename.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Wrap each inline asm function in its own `#pragma push`/`#pragma pop` pair to contain pragma/compiler state.
Use `// clang-format off` immediately at the asm function opening brace and `// clang-format on` at the closing brace to preserve assembly formatting.
Avoid relying on a later `#pragma peephole on` after asm; this PR removed that pattern in favor of localized pragma scopes.
The inline asm bodies for `func_803647DC`, `func_80364924`, and `HSD_ForeachAnim` were preserved while only their surrounding formatting/pragmas changed.
searchable_terms: Clean up pragmas in aobj and reformat
follow_up_queries: Find other inline asm functions that still require localized `#pragma push`/`#pragma pop` cleanup.
Search for remaining comments about asm disabling peephole optimization after asm blocks.
Search for files with `#pragma peephole on` after inline asm to see whether this aobj cleanup pattern should be reused.
Check nearby baselib files for mixed lowercase and uppercase float suffix style if doing formatting-only cleanup.
